title: qa-compliance cert-preflight verdict
description: Platform-compliance go/no-go before submission (Steam review, Deck Verified, PS5 TRC, Xbox XR, Switch Lotcheck). Checklist-driven; blocking items (CFR-equivalents) fail the verdict, advisories don't. First-submission failure is normal in the industry — the point of preflight is to catch it before the real queue.

manual_checks_needed.description: items that require a human with hardware (e.g. suspend/resume on devkit) — reported honestly, never marked pass
